base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fruit_bonus_cherry — a pickup_item from 1980 pac man. Cherry bonus — appears in front of ghost-pen at 70 + 170 dots remaining. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cherry bonus — appears in front of ghost-pen at 70 + 170 dots remaining; worth 100 points; levels 1-2
